name: andrej-karpathy-skills
description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, inspired by Andrej Karpathy's observations.

interface.shortDescription: Coding behavior guidelines to reduce common LLM mistakes
interface.longDescription: Use this plugin for behavior-first coding guidance: think before coding, keep solutions simple, make surgical changes, and execute against verifiable goals.
defaultPrompt: Use Karpathy guidelines to review this implementation plan for avoidable complexity.
Apply these guidelines while refactoring this module with minimal, focused edits.
Turn this coding request into clear success criteria and a verification loop.
